title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: NotebookLM is presented as a document management and AI-assisted content generation tool with a three-column interface. It includes a Sources panel for input documents, a Chat panel for interaction, and a Studio panel with multiple output tools including Reports, Slide Decks, Infographics, Mind Maps, Data Tables, Video Overviews, Flashcards, Audio Overviews, and Quiz generation.
